creator: Udo.Schweigert@siemens.com
text:
This can't be reproduced here, and it is very likely a local problem as the
building process stops without giving a proper error report. I would prefer
to clodse this PR.

For further investigation I would need the contents of
/var/db/ports/mutt-devel/options (but I don't think it's worth to do that).

Udo

On Wed, Mar 09, 2011 at 22:31:29 +0100, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of mail/mutt-devel,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/155422 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
